bio: Born and raised in Petersburg, West Virginia, I began my journey at fourteen — making YouTube videos and teaching myself video editing purely for the love of it.

At twenty I fell into landscape photography, and from there into professional portrait work. Then I landed my first wedding videography job, and after seeing how thrilled my clients were, I never looked back.

Five-plus years of full-time wedding filmmaking later, my gear and my craft have grown alongside me through countless revisions — all so I can deliver the most beautiful film possible while staying calm and efficient in the fast-paced moments that matter most.
heroEyebrow: Cinematic Wedding Films · by Hunter Sites
aboutQuote: The art of capturing life's special moments is my greatest passion. Through videography I make them everlasting.
